Värde Partners is a leading global investment firm specializing in credit and credit-related assets.","score":0.9374919,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.connectmoney.com/stories/varde-led-consortium-executes-1-7b-srt-deal-with-klarna","title":"Värde-Led Consortium Executes $1.7B SRT Deal with Klarna","content":"A consortium led by Värde Partners has entered a $1.7 billion significant risk transfer (SRT) transaction with Klarna.","score":0.910998,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://thenextweb.com/news/klarna-srt-lending-deal-stock-decline","title":"Klarna strikes $1.7B deal to support $40B lending as stock falls 76% from IPO","content":"# Klarna just struck a $1.7 billion deal to free up capital for $40 billion in lending. Its stock is down 76 per cent from its IPO high. On Tuesday, it announced a $1.7 billion significant risk transfer transaction with a consortium led by Värde Partners, its sixth such deal, designed to free up capital and support up to $40 billion in lending. For Klarna, which holds a Swedish banking licence and operates as a regulated bank, the SRT structure allows it to stretch its capital across a much larger loan book than its balance sheet would otherwise support. It is the kind of statement that reads differently depending on whether you view Klarna as a technology company that happens to have a banking licence or a bank that happens to have good software. Together, the two deals give Klarna a capital architecture that can support more than $40 billion in total lending capacity, a figure that dwarfs the company’s current balance sheet and speaks to the ambition of its expansion, particularly in the United States.","score":0.8742601,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/varde-partners_today-we-announced-a-17-billion-significant-activity-7445079231908278272-RuZS","title":"Värde Partners Announces $1.7B SRT Transaction with ...","content":"Today, we announced a $1.7 billion Significant Risk Transfer (SRT) transaction with Klarna, a global digital bank and flexible payments provider","score":0.8488849,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.investing.com/news/company-news/klarna-secures-17b-risk-transfer-deal-to-free-up-capital-93CH-4592794","title":"Klarna secures $1.7B risk transfer deal to free up capital","content":"STOCKHOLM - Klarna has completed a Significant Risk Transfer transaction covering $1.7 billion in euro-denominated loans, according to a press release statement. The transaction marks Klarna’s sixth SRT deal and aims to improve capital deployment efficiency across its global operations. \"These transactions allow us to maximize every unit of capital to support our continued momentum.\"The capital efficiency focus comes as Klarna posted revenue of $3.5 billion over the last twelve months with 25% revenue growth, though the company maintains a strong liquidity position with a current ratio of 23.9. The deal follows Klarna’s recent announcement of a $2 billion facility supporting expansion of its U.S. financing operations to $17 billion. The company has doubled its loan sale agreement with Elliott Investment Management to $2 billion, which is anticipated to support up to $17 billion in U.S. financing loans over the program’s life. This expansion extends the partnership’s term by one year to a total of three years.","score":0.82560414,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.2,"request_id":"0ea750b2-b1cd-437a-955f-f9423d501261"}
